differential_diagnoses: Septic shock due to bacterial translocation or spontaneous bacterial peritonitis
next_steps: Dengue virus diagnostic testing (PCR and NS1 antigen)
Malaria thick and thin blood smears (repeated)
Comprehensive blood, urine, and ascitic fluid cultures

differential_diagnoses: Spontaneous bacterial peritonitis with septic shock
Acute-on-chronic liver failure (ACLF) with circulatory collapse
next_steps: Diagnostic paracentesis for cell count, differential, and culture
Serial peripheral blood smears for parasites and leukocyte evaluation
Dengue virus diagnostic testing (PCR and NS1 antigen)
Comprehensive serum studies including ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and LDH for HLH screening
Serial cardiac biomarkers (Troponin T/I and NT-proBNP)
Liver function tests and coagulation panel (PT/INR) to assess liver synthetic function
Blood, urine, and repeat ascitic fluid cultures for targeted antibiotic therapy
